results.title: October
results.overview: A fugitive thriller set during Halloween. Plot TBA.

results.title: Deep Cuts
results.overview: A love story about two music-obsessed twenty-somethings navigating the messy realities of ambition, belonging and adulthood over the course of an era-defining decade.

results.title: Peaked
results.overview: The two girls who traumatized you in high school try to relive their glory days at their 10-year reunion.

results.title: The Masque of the Red Death
results.original_title: The Masque of the Red Death
results.overview: A noblewoman's exile leads her twin to assume her identity in a plague-sealed medieval kingdom. As she navigates deadly court intrigue with her daughter, she questions whether safety behind castle walls is worth the price of brutality.

results.title: Ancient History
results.overview: Plot TBA. Said to be exclusively comprised of only three speaking parts.

results.title: Going Infinite
results.overview: Plot TBA. Based on Michael Lewis' New York Times bestseller 'Going Infinite: The Rise and Fall of a New Tycoon'.

results.title: Bushido
results.overview: A high-stakes action film set against the backdrop of feudal Japan.

results.title: Misty Green
results.overview: Misty is an undeniably talented actress, but her vices have derailed every attempt to revitalise her career. Her best opportunity in ages arrives in the form of Jordan, a film director with the perfect role for her—were it not for their contentious past.

results.title: The Land of Nod
results.overview: A group of isolated neighbors in their small and secluded town in the northern Canadian territories during a snowstorm.

results.title: Altar
results.overview: Described as a horror film that follows the summer of a young boy, forced to grow up faster than he ever imagined.

results.title: Why Don't You Love Me?
results.overview: A miserable couple, Claire and Mark, struggles through their marriage while “feeling like something is not quite right in their reality.”

results.title: The Wives
results.overview: Plot details are being kept in the body bag, but it is being described as being partly inspired by the Real Housewives franchise, which focuses on the soap operatic and over-the-top theatrics of well-to-do women in areas ranging from Orange County to Miami to Atlanta.

results.title: The Heaven & Earth Grocery Store
results.overview: McBride’s novel tells the story of Black and Jewish residents of the Chicken Hill neighborhood of Pottstown, Pennsylvania in the 1920s and ‘30s.

results.title: The Looming
results.overview: A feature adaptation of Masha Ko’s Sundance short of the same name. When a virtual home assistant speaker picks up the strange noise a man has heard in his house, he realizes that it may not be a symptom of dementia.

results.title: Checkmate
results.overview: The story centers on what has been described as the “biggest scandal in the history of chess,” following the controversial 2022 head-to-head match between Grandmasters Magnus Carlsen, then world champion, and Hans Niemann, during which the latter was accused of cheating.

results.title: Famous
results.overview: Lance Dunkquist has one asset that’s about to change his life—he has the face of a movie star. And not just any movie star—Lance is the spitting image of a Hollywood icon, James Jansen. Lance is about to travel to Los Angeles to make his dream come true. Lance is going to be famous, no matter what it takes…

results.title: Untitled Elon Musk Biopic
results.overview: Based on Walter Isaacson’s authorized biography of the controversial tech mogul.

results.title: Talk 2 Me
results.overview: The sequel to the 2022 film. Plot TBA.

results.title: Untitled Talk to Me Prequel
results.overview: A prequel short film that tells the story of Duckett entirely through cell phones and social media.
